PB SQL片段标识: 资产作废待审核列表查询
一致性校验SQL: SELECT A.OPBILLID,A.SLBILLID,A.CUSTCD,C.CUSTCARD,A.IMPDATE,A.TRAINDATE,A.BUSITYP,A.SLTYP,A.ITEMCD,A.OPERCD,A.BACKUP,A.GENDATE,A.USEFLG,A.AUDITFLG,A.AUDITMAN,A.AUDITDATE FROM TWH19_ASSET_C_A A LEFT JOIN TMM22_CUSTOMERS C ON C.CUSTCD=A.CUSTCD WHERE A.USEFLG<>'9' AND A.AUDITFLG='1' ...

一致性校验SQL: SELECT D.OPBILLID,D.CUSTCARD,D.CUSTCD,C.CUSTNM,D.EID,E.ITEMCD,I.ITEMNM,D.PLANQTY,D.OPQTY,D.CLQTY,D.USEFLG,D.IMPDATE,D.TRAINDATE,D.NEWADDRESS,D.NEWCUSTCARD,D.NEWCUSTCD,D.ADDRESS FROM TWH20_ASSET_C_A_DTL D JOIN TMM43_EID E ON E.EID=D.EID JOIN TMM12_ITEMS I ON I.ITEMCD=E.ITEMCD JOIN TMM22_CUSTOMERS C ON C.CUSTCD=D.CUSTCD WHERE D.OPBILLID=:opbillid AND D.CUSTCD LIKE :custcd_like
备注: 来源：PB主从联动明细口径（BG场景custcd可为%）

一致性校验SQL: SELECT M.MAINTENANCE_ID,C.CLASSCD,C.CUSTCARD,C.CUSTNM,C.PHONENO,C.ADDRESS,M.REQUEST_TIME,M.SHORT_DESCRIPTION,M.DETAIL_DESCRIPTION,U.ACCPECTD_GROUP,U.ACCPECTDER,U.DISPATCH_TIME,M.CREATOR,M.CREATE_TIME FROM TIT21_MAINTENANCE_DISPATCH U,TIT10_MAINTENANCEDAY M,TMM22_CUSTOMERS C WHERE U.MAINTENANCE_ID=M.MAINTENANCE_ID AND C.CUSTCD=M.STORE_ID AND U.DISPATCH_TIME>=:start_date AND U.DISPATCH_TIME<:end_date+1 ...

PB SQL片段标识: 纸张平均报表聚合查询
一致性校验SQL: SELECT AREANM,PAPER_ID,SUM(...) COUNT_ZS1,... FROM V_ITSM_PAPER_AVERAGEL_DB V LEFT JOIN TIT10_MAINTENANCE_LIABILITY L ON ... LEFT JOIN TIT23_MAINTENANCE_D2D D ON ... WHERE V.CREATE_TIME>=:start_date AND V.CREATE_TIME<:end_date+1 AND V.FAULT_TYPE='1' GROUP BY PAPER_ID ORDER BY NVL(AREANM,'ZZ'),LPAD(PAPER_ID,10,'0')

一致性校验SQL: SELECT t.custcd,t.custcard,c.classnm,t.custnm,t.address,t.phoneno,CASE WHEN t.busityp='ZS' THEN '直属' ELSE '延伸' END AS busityp,N.eid,N.itemcd,a.name AS areanm,... FROM tmm21_custclass c,tmm22_customers t,tmm46_area a,(SELECT p.custcd,MAX(p.itemcd),MAX(p.eid) FROM tmm35_cust_pos_rl p WHERE p.useflg='1' GROUP BY p.custcd) n WHERE n.custcd(+)=t.custcd AND t.classcd=c.classcd AND t.area=a.id ...
备注: 来源：PB d_cust_info DataWindow口径

一致性校验SQL: SELECT m.daily_maintenance_id,MAX(c.classcd),MAX(c.custcd),MAX(c.custcard),...,MAX(p.itemcd) FROM tit17_maintenance m,tmm22_customers c,tit17_cust_pos_daily p WHERE m.store_id=c.custcd AND m.daily_maintenance_id=p.daily_maintenance_id(+) AND m.create_time>=:start_date AND m.create_time<:end_date+1 ... GROUP BY m.daily_maintenance_id
备注: 来源：PB d_itsm_maintenance_daily_report DataWindow口径

PB SQL片段标识: 日常维护月度汇总报表查询
一致性校验SQL: SELECT a.area,a.store_sum,a.store_sum1,a.count_sum,a.store_sum0,b.double_count FROM (SELECT area,SUM(store_sum),SUM(store_sum1),SUM(store_sum0),SUM(count_sum) FROM v_itsm_md_sum WHERE NVL(close_date,:start_date)>=:start_date AND NVL(close_date,:end_date)<=:end_date+1 GROUP BY area) a,(SELECT MAX(v.area),SUM(v.count_sum)-1 FROM v_itsm_md_sum v WHERE ... GROUP BY v.store_id HAVING SUM(v.count_sum)>1) b WHERE a.area=b.area(+)
备注: 来源：PB d_itsm_maintenance_plan_report DataWindow arguments=(START_DATE END_DATE)

PB SQL片段标识: 日常维护年月汇总报表查询
一致性校验SQL: SELECT a.area,a.plan_qty,b.count_sum FROM (SELECT p.area_id,p.plan_qty FROM tit17_maintenance_plan p WHERE plan_yymm=:in_ym) a,(SELECT c.area,COUNT(*) FROM tit17_maintenance m,tmm22_customers c WHERE m.current_status='3' AND m.store_id=c.custcd AND m.close_time>TO_DATE(:in_ym,'YYYYMM') AND m.close_time<LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(:in_ym,'YYYYMM'))+1 GROUP BY c.area) b WHERE a.area=b.area(+)
备注: 来源：PB d_itsm_maintenance_plan_ym_report DataWindow arguments=(IN_YM string YYYYMM)
